profiles.name: TOEFL 준비 — 한국 고등학생 (80→100, 2달, panic)
profiles.userMessage: I'm a Korean high school student preparing for TOEFL. Test is in 2 months. Current score is about 80, target is 100. 1 hour a day.

profiles.userMessage: 직장인인데 TOEFL 준비해야 해요. 시험 2달 뒤. 현재 85점, 목표 100. 퇴근 후 1시간.

profiles.name: TOEFL 준비 — 대학원 지원 (90→100+, Writing 약점, neutral)
profiles.userMessage: Applying to grad school, need TOEFL 100+. Test in 2 months. Currently around 90. Writing section is weak. I can study 2 hours a day.
